message:
fix(queries): add nil guard in GetBlockedIssues and GetEpicsEligibleForClosure

Cherry-picked from PR #1824 (sjsyrek). The N+1 batching from that PR
was already on main; these two defensive nil checks were the remaining
contribution. Prevents potential nil dereference when GetIssuesByIDs
returns a map entry without a value.

Co-authored-by: sjsyrek <sjsyrek@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
